text.title: impl-plan-100k-rule Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for impl-plan-100k-rule as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents asked to "create all tasks now" create Wave 2 and Wave 3 stubs with placeholder content.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Placeholder task files degrade the quality of Wave 2 and 3 execution. Enforce wave-gated creation in the planning prompt.
